examples.title: Inner Product
examples.description: A pseudocode implementation of the inner product.
examples.code:
FUNCTION innerProduct(vector1, vector2)
  RETURN SUM(vector1[i] * vector2[i] FOR i FROM 0 TO LENGTH(vector1) - 1)
END FUNCTION
examples.explanation: This pseudocode calculates the inner product of two vectors.

examples.title: Inner Product
examples.description: A Python implementation of the inner product.
examples.code:
def inner_product(vector1, vector2):
  return sum(a * b for a, b in zip(vector1, vector2))
examples.explanation: This Python code calculates the inner product of two vectors.
